name: linSetBaudrate
title: linSetBaudrate
syntax: Void linSetBaudrate(long minBaudrate, long maxBaudrate); // form 2
description: With this function it is possible to change the baud rate during the measurement.
It is also possible to activate automatic baud rate detection in a specified range.

parameters.name: baudrate
parameters.description: Baudrate to be set [in bit/sec]. Value range: 200 Baud – 30500 Baud

parameters.name: minBaudrate
parameters.description: The lower border of the automatic baud rate detection range. Value range: 200 Baud – maxBaudrate

parameters.name: maxBaudrate
parameters.description: The upper border of the automatic baud rate detection range. Value range: minBaudrate – 30500 Baud

description: Change baud rate on keyboard event

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
